subcodes.first_line: O Divine Providence, O Munificent and Benevolent One! The Sovereign was a companion, full of health and love, gracious as Kay Khosrow and noble as Ardashir [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یزدانا بخشنده و مهربانا شهریار یار بود و سلامت پر محبت و کیخسرو خوشخو و اردشیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @love of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
